title: Hudson River Trading's Dunning on Recent Market Worry and AI Upskilling
description: Iain Dunning, Hudson River Trading Head of AI, discusses recent market worry and AI upskilling. He speaks with Bloomberg’s Tim Stenovec and Carol Massar from the Bloomberg Invest conference in New York City. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AllianceBernstein's Andrew Chin on Efficiency, Use Cases and AI Guardrails
description: Andrew Chin, AllianceBernstein Chief AI Officer, discusses efficiency, use cases and AI guardrails. He speaks with Bloomberg’s Tim Stenovec and Carol Massar from the Bloomberg Invest conference in New York City. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Citi's Chronert Expects Stock Volatility to Persist Near Term
description: Scott Chronert, Citi US equity strategist, says the duration of the conflict in Iran is critical for stocks and will lead to short-term volatility but overall stocks are in good shape. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
